synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20920 Oracle Linux 9 nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20920
description:
[2.2.52-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.52
- Support interface alternative names. RHEL-110777
- Support IPv4 forwarding. RHEL-110786
- Support IPSec `leftsendcert` option. RHEL-110633
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20920

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20920.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
nmstate-2.2.52-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
nmstate-devel-2.2.52-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
nmstate-devel-2.2.52-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
nmstate-libs-2.2.52-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
nmstate-libs-2.2.52-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
nmstate-static-2.2.52-1.el9_7.i686.rpm
nmstate-static-2.2.52-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
python3-libnmstate-2.2.52-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
nmstate-2.2.52-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
nmstate-devel-2.2.52-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
nmstate-libs-2.2.52-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
nmstate-static-2.2.52-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
python3-libnmstate-2.2.52-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/nmstate-2.2.52-1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:
[2.2.52-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.52
- Support interface alternative names. RHEL-110777
- Support IPv4 forwarding. RHEL-110786
- Support IPSec `leftsendcert` option. RHEL-110633
